description_long: This car features a sleek, angular body with a metallic silver finish and distinctive blue accent lines running along the sides and roof. The front end is characterized by a wide, flat hood, rectangular headlights, and a black bumper, giving it a retro-futuristic appearance. The side profile reveals gullwing-style door outlines, large black wheels, and a sharply sloped rear window leading to a prominent rear deck with exposed mechanical components. The rear of the car is equipped with a large, angular spoiler, dual exhaust pipes, and a set of red, rectangular taillights. The windows are tinted blue, and the overall design is reminiscent of iconic 1980s sports cars, particularly the DeLorean DMC-12. The car appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, with rubber tires and plastic trim elements.
description: A silver, angular sports car with blue accent lines, gullwing-style doors, and a prominent rear spoiler, reminiscent of a DeLorean.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, flat hood, rectangular headlights, and blue-tinted windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the blue accent lines, gullwing door outline, and sloped rear with exposed components.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large spoiler, dual exhausts, and red rectangular taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue accent lines, gullwing door, and rear deck details.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual rectangular headlights with a horizontal arrangement and integrated turn signals
